use_cases: Searchable dropdown selection for forms in SaaS applications
Autocomplete suggestions for user input fields
Filtering and selecting items from large lists
Interactive form element with clear and trigger functionality
Accessible combobox with keyboard navigation support
ai_summary: A searchable combobox component from Base UI that provides autocomplete and dropdown selection functionality. Features a clean flat design with input field, clear button, and animated popup menu for selecting items from a predefined list. Suitable for forms requiring quick item lookup and selection.
